mapper.update: UPDATE biz_customer SET customer_code = #{customerCode}, customer_name = #{customerName}, contact = #{contact}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, address = #{address}, credit_limit = #{creditLimit}, current_debt = #{currentDebt}, customer_level = #{customerLevel}, is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM biz_customer WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT * FROM biz_customer
is_deleted = false
AND customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
AND is_enabled = #{isEnabled}
ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_customer SET is_deleted = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
